agent_for_service.value: Commissioner of Securities, 101 East Wilson Street, P.O. Box 1768, Madison, Wisconsin 53701-1768

value: Rocky Rococo Corporation — owns trademark rights, licensor
Airport Pizza Roc, Inc. — owns/operates 2 restaurants (since 2003)
TRH Restaurants II, Inc. — owns/operates 2 restaurants (since 2007)
TRH Restaurants III, Inc. — owns/operates 1 restaurant (since 2021)

development_structure.value: Single-unit franchise. No multi-unit development agreement disclosed. Multi-unit ownership exists in practice.

refundability.value: Non-refundable after 10 days. Deposit refundable if no site found within 180 days (unless terminated for cause).

royalty.conditional_reduction: Retroactively reduced to 3.5% if annual sales below $425,000 (52-week year) or $433,173 (53-week year)

marketing_fund.value: Up to 0.75% of gross sales weekly

local_advertising.value: Up to 3.5% of gross sales (tiered: 1.5% no electronic, 2.5% radio, 3.5% TV)
local_advertising.current_status: Local Ad Fund not currently being collected; franchisee must independently spend the applicable percentage

designated_suppliers.value: Only one: national soft drink supplier designated by RFC

franchisor_revenue_from_purchases.value: None. RFC and affiliates derive no revenue or material consideration from franchisee purchases.

purchasing_freedom.value: 100% of items (except designated soft drink) may be purchased from supplier of franchisee's choosing

spec_compliance.value: All ingredients must conform to RFC recipes. Products, supplies, packaging must meet RFC specifications.

additional_ojt.duration: Up to 20 weeks at affiliate restaurants

opening_assistance.cost: RFC covers first 5 days; franchisee pays for any extension

franchisee_cost_burden.value: Franchisee bears all transportation, lodging, meals, wages, employee benefits for training.

pos_system.value: RFC may specify computer hardware and POS system (~$10,000)

dedicated_line.value: Franchisee must establish and maintain a dedicated line for RFC to access computer system

website.value: RFC develops and maintains website. Franchisee may not create separate website.

upgrades.value: RFC may require upgrades; cannot estimate frequency or cost. Cost may not be fully amortizable over remaining term.

data_access_adjudicated.value: RFC has full data access rights per FA Sect. IX.D. Item 11 p.32 statement ('does not have access') is contradicted by FA operative language and Item 11 p.31. FA controls.

type.value: 1-mile radius exclusive territory around franchised location

value: Major regional shopping mall locations (500K+ sq ft, 2+ dept store anchors) do not receive 1-mile protection
A mall within franchisee's 1-mile radius is not a violation
Central business district locations (RFC's sole judgment) receive no 1-mile protection

not_exclusive_disclaimer.value: You will not receive an exclusive territory. You may face competition from other franchisees, from outlets that RFC owns, or from other channels of distribution or competitive brands that RFC controls.

continuation_conditions.value: Not dependent on sales volume, market penetration, or any other contingency. Cannot be altered without written consent of both parties.

right_of_first_refusal_for_additional.value: No option, right of first refusal, or similar right to acquire additional franchises within territory or contiguous territories.

renewal_conditions.value: Good standing, execute then-current FA (may contain materially different terms), general release, remodel, retraining. No renewal fee.

transfer_conditions.value: RFC approval required (not unreasonably withheld). Transfer fee 50% of current initial fee. New franchisee qualifies, accounts current, release signed, remodel, training, noncompete.

termination_by_franchisor.value: Only with cause. Curable: 60 days (10 days for non-payment). Non-curable: immediate for bankruptcy, abandonment, criminal misconduct, material misrepresentation, etc.

termination_by_franchisee.value: No provision in FA. FDA only: if unable to acquire site within 180 days.

post_termination.value: De-identification, payment of amounts due, covenant not to compete.

franchisor_purchase_option.value: RFC may elect within 60 days of termination/expiration to purchase all tangible assets at fair market value.

right_of_first_refusal.value: RFC can match any offer for the franchise business.

death_disability.value: Estate must apply to continue or transfer within 6 months. No transfer fee for estate continuation.

during_term.value: No involvement in competing business anywhere

post_term_fa.value: 1 year within 5 miles of designated area or 5 miles of any system location

post_term_fda.value: 1 year within 50 miles of designated area or 50 miles of any system location

noncompete.discrepancy_note: FA and FDA noncompete radii differ by 10x (5 miles vs 50 miles). Both are disclosed. Subject to state law.

method.value: Binding arbitration via American Arbitration Association at its office nearest RFC

exception.value: Legality of WI Franchise Investment Law and WI Fair Dealership Act not subject to arbitration

jury_waiver.value: Each party irrevocably waives trial by jury

claims_limitation.value: All claims barred unless commenced within 1 year

damages_waiver.value: Both parties waive punitive/exemplary damages. Franchisee waives money damages for unreasonable withholding of consent.

litigation_summary.value: No litigation required to be disclosed

bankruptcy_flag.value: No bankruptcy required to be disclosed

item18_public_figure_flag.value: RFC does not use any public figures to promote its franchise

item19_performance_summary.value: No financial performance representation made. RFC does not make any representations about franchisee future financial performance or past financial performance of company-owned or franchised outlets.

confidentiality_clauses.value: No franchisees have signed confidentiality clauses during the last 3 fiscal years

franchisee_count.note: 20 distinct franchisee entities listed across WI and MN

guaranty.value: Owner's Guarantee and Assumption of Franchisee's Obligations embedded in Exhibit FA (pp.146–147). Personal, unconditional guarantee by all owners.

related_party_facility.value: RFC operates from facility leased by related party at no charge

value.name: Amy R. Bartley
value.title: Secretary, Director of Marketing, and Director

value: Out-of-state dispute resolution via AAA at office nearest RFC home office

unresolveds.detail: The state cover page (p.6) and 'What You Need to Know' section reference state-specific addenda, but no state addenda exhibits are listed in the TOC or found in the document. The FDD is registered in 5 states (IL, IN, MI, MN, WI). Whether addenda exist and were omitted from this filing, or whether the boilerplate language is vestigial, is not determinable from this document alone.
Item 11 states RFC does not have access to franchisee computer information (p.32) but requires franchisees to establish a dedicated line for RFC to access the computer system (p.31).

unresolveds.issue: Noncompete radius discrepancy between FA and FDA
unresolveds.detail: FA noncompete is 1 year within 5 miles. FDA noncompete is 1 year within 50 miles. Both are disclosed but the 10x discrepancy is unusual and may create enforcement questions.

Item 12 grants a 1-mile radius protection but also explicitly disclaims exclusive territory. The reconciliation (protection from same-brand units vs. broader commercial exclusivity) is implicit, not explicitly stated.

contradictions.value_b: You will not receive an exclusive territory
contradictions.resolution: Reconcilable: 1-mile protection prevents new same-brand units only; not exclusive in broader commercial sense

contradictions.value_a: RFC does not have access to your computer information
contradictions.value_b: Franchisee must establish dedicated line for RFC to access computer system
contradictions.resolution: Possibly distinguishing current access vs. right to access; language creates tension
Both disclosed; FA governs the operating franchise, FDA governs the pre-site-selection period

retry_enhancements.RT-01_item20_repair: Franchised outlet table confirmed. Combined Opened/Transferred column verified. Cross-reference with Note 3 resolves breakdown: 2024 had 3 predecessor conversions, 2023 had 3 predecessor conversions + 1 net new.
retry_enhancements.RT-02_balance_sheet_repair: Key totals confirmed. 2023 accounts payable: $5,594 (OCR: 5,s94). 2023 total current liabilities: $251,815. 2022 total current liabilities: $235,159. 2022 net PP&E: $14,446.
retry_enhancements.RT-03_franchisee_list: 20 franchisee entities extracted in structured format. 5 multi-unit operator groups identified. Regi Derks/Dirks name variant noted.
retry_enhancements.RT-04_state_addenda: Confirmed absent from document. Only SBA addendum found (pp.148-150). Subject to State Law qualifiers in Item 17 provide partial coverage.

data_ownership.value: RFC has at all times the right to retrieve information from franchisee computer system. All information is exclusive property of RFC.

computer_upgrade_cost_cap.value: $10,000 cap if franchisee has spent at least $10K in previous 5 years

credit_card_acceptance.value: Must accept full range of credit/debit cards, check verification, and EFT systems as RFC designates

gift_card_provisions.value: Must purchase through RFC; may not produce own gift certificates or cards; system-wide accounting

system_modification_rights.value: RFC may change/modify System including marks, products, services, techniques. Franchisee must accept and make expenditures as reasonably called for. Reasonable notice required.

eft_provisions.value: RFC may require EFT for all fees. Franchisee must authorize direct debits from business bank account. If no sales reported, RFC may debit last reported period amount. RFC may debit based on computer system data.

remodel_obligations.mandatory_remodel: At least once during term per RFC plans/specs
remodel_obligations.remodel_restriction: Not required during last 4 years of initial or renewal term

security_interest_ucc.lien_type: First lien on all franchisee property (equipment, inventory, trade fixtures, leasehold improvements, all proceeds)
security_interest_ucc.remedies: All UCC secured party remedies; public or private sale
security_interest_ucc.perfection: Franchisee must execute UCC financing statements
security_interest_ucc.subordination: RFC shall subordinate to bank first liens and purchase money interests on demand

payment_application.value: RFC has sole discretion to apply payments to any past due indebtedness

advertising_expense_actuals.note: RFC consistently spends at or slightly above collected ad fees

vie_election.value: RFC elected not to apply VIE guidance to related party entities under common control per ASU 2018-17. Hester family affiliate entities are NOT consolidated.
vie_election.effect: Financial statements reflect only the franchisor entity. The 7 affiliate-owned restaurants are excluded.

accounting_policies.receivables_allowance: No allowance needed; no provisions; no write-offs (all 3 years)
accounting_policies.royalty_reduction_accounting: Credits difference to franchisees' balance owed in the future (vs. FDD Item 6 which says 'refund within 30 days')

state_addenda.note: FDD references state-specific addenda in boilerplate (p.4) but none are included despite registration in 5 states. The Item 17 table contains 'subject to State Law' qualifiers for noncompete, choice of forum, and integration clauses.
